description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry using docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com in a global before_script. Define a single build stage with a job named build that runs on the docker:latest image and uses the docker:dind service. In the build job execute apk add make followed by make publish -C ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
